services.title: Our medical services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive care with the best professionals near Playa San Juan.
svc.general.name: General Medicine
svc.general.desc: General consultations, annual check-ups, medical certificates and primary care.
svc.general.full: We offer general medicine consultations for the whole family.
svc.cardio.name: Cardiology
svc.cardio.desc: ECG, echocardiography, hypertension monitoring and cardiovascular diseases.
svc.cardio.full: Complete diagnosis and treatment of cardiovascular diseases.
svc.pediatric.name: Pediatrics
svc.pediatric.desc: Growth monitoring, vaccinations, pediatric emergency care for families and tourists.
svc.pediatric.full: Growth monitoring, vaccinations, childhood illnesses and pediatric emergencies.
svc.dermato.name: Dermatology
svc.dermato.desc: Diagnosis and treatment of skin diseases, dermal allergies and mole monitoring.
svc.dermato.full: Diagnosis and treatment of eczema, psoriasis, acne and dermal allergies.
svc.gyneco.name: Gynecology
svc.gyneco.desc: Gynecological check-ups, obstetric ultrasound, family planning and women's health.
svc.gyneco.full: Gynecological check-ups, cytology, transvaginal ultrasound and family planning.
svc.tele.name: Teleconsultation
svc.tele.desc: Medical consultation by video call via Teams, from anywhere.
svc.tele.full: Medical consultation by video call from anywhere. Ideal for tourists and expats.
svc.travel.name: Travel Medicine
svc.travel.desc: International vaccines, health advice and travel certificates.
svc.travel.full: International vaccines, health advice and travel certificates for tourists and expats.
svc.trauma.name: Traumatology
svc.trauma.desc: Sports injuries, fractures, sprains and musculoskeletal pathology.
svc.trauma.full: Treatment of sports injuries, fractures, sprains and spinal pathology.

faq.title: Do you have a question?
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about our clinic.
faq.rdv.q1: How can I book an appointment?
faq.rdv.a1: You can book online, by phone, WhatsApp or chatbot. You'll receive email confirmation.
faq.rdv.q2: How far in advance should I book?
faq.rdv.a2: We recommend 24-48h in advance. For minor emergencies we try to see you the same day.
faq.rdv.q3: Can I cancel or change my appointment?
faq.rdv.a3: Yes, via the link in the confirmation email, by phone or chatbot.
faq.rdv.a4: Yes, via Microsoft Teams video call. The link is sent 15 minutes before your appointment.
faq.svc.a1: General Medicine, Cardiology, Pediatrics, Dermatology, Gynecology, Traumatology, Travel Medicine and Teleconsultation.
faq.svc.q2: Do you treat tourists and foreigners?
faq.svc.a2: Absolutely. We speak 9 languages and welcome residents, tourists and expats.
faq.svc.q3: Do you perform blood tests and diagnostic tests?
faq.svc.a3: Yes, blood tests, ECG, ultrasound and other basic tests.
faq.tar.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.tar.a1: Cash, card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and bank transfer.
faq.tar.q2: Do you work with health insurance?
faq.tar.a2: We work with major insurers. We issue invoices for travel insurance reimbursement.
faq.tar.q3: Can I get an invoice for my travel insurance?
faq.tar.a3: Yes, we issue detailed invoices. Ask at the end of your consultation.
faq.doc.a1: Passport or ID/NIE, insurance card and relevant medical history.
faq.doc.q2: How can I send my medical documents?
faq.doc.a2: Through our secure upload platform. You'll receive email confirmation.
faq.doc.a3: Yes. GDPR compliant. All data encrypted on European servers.
faq.cta.text: Can't find your answer? Contact us directly.

rdv.info.title: Useful information
rdv.info.confirm.desc: You'll receive an email confirmation with doctor's name, date, time and access link.
rdv.info.tele.desc: The video call link is sent 15 min before your appointment.
rdv.info.cancel.desc: Cancel via the confirmation email link or chatbot at least 2h in advance.
rdv.info.docs.desc: You can send medical documents via the link in the confirmation.
rdv.type.label: Appointment type
rdv.doctor.hint: Assigned doctor may vary based on availability.
rdv.motive.placeholder: Briefly describe the reason for your consultation...
rdv.motive.hint: This information helps the doctor prepare your consultation.
rdv.pref.hint: We'll suggest 2 available slots on or near this date.
rdv.disclaimer: This form is not for medical emergencies. In case of emergency, call 112.
rdv.success.title: Request sent!
rdv.success.desc: We'll contact you within 2 hours to confirm your appointment. Check your email.

chat.title: Clínica Las Calas Assistant
chat.disclaimer: This assistant does not make medical diagnoses. For medical care, please book a consultation.
chat.welcome:
Hello! I'm the Clínica Las Calas assistant. How can I help you today?

⚠️ Remember: I do not make medical diagnoses. For any medical query, I recommend booking an appointment with our specialists.
footer.desc: Multi-specialty medical clinic in Alicante, Cap de las Huertas. Quality care for residents, tourists and expats.
